message:
feat(security): add type-state lifecycle pattern for compile-time transition enforcement [MOR/C3.3]

Add TypedLifecycleRecord<S> with phantom-typed state markers (StatePending,
StateInstalling, StateCanary, StateProduction, StateRolledBack, StateDisabled,
StateUninstalled). Transition methods only exist on valid source states —
invalid transitions are compile errors. AnyLifecycleRecord provides erased
storage for heterogeneous collections. 8 acceptance tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
